38 #include <winsock2.h>
39 #if defined(nats_EXPORTS)
40 #define NATS_EXTERN __declspec(dllexport)
41 #elif defined(nats_IMPORTS)
42 #define NATS_EXTERN __declspec(dllimport)
43 #else
44 #define NATS_EXTERN
45 #endif
46
47 typedef SOCKET natsSock;
48#else
49 #define NATS_EXTERN
50 typedef int natsSock;
51#endif

86#define NATS_DEFAULT_URL "nats://localhost:4222"
87
97 #define JSMsgSize "Nats-Msg-Size"
98
111 #define JSMsgRollup "Nats-Rollup"
112
120 #define JSMsgRollupSubject "sub"
121
129 #define JSMsgRollupAll "all"
130
131 // Headers for republished messages and direct get.
132 #define JSStream "Nats-Stream"
133 #define JSSequence "Nats-Sequence"
134 #define JSLastSequence "Nats-Last-Sequence"
135 #define JSTimeStamp "Nats-Time-Stamp"
136 #define JSSubject "Nats-Subject"
137
138//
139// Types.
140//
152typedef struct __natsConnection natsConnection;
153
159typedef struct __natsStatistics natsStatistics;
160
165typedef struct __natsSubscription natsSubscription;
166
172typedef struct __natsMsg natsMsg;
173
178typedef struct __natsOptions natsOptions;
179
187typedef char natsInbox;
188
193typedef struct __natsHeader natsHeader;

195#ifndef BUILD_IN_DOXYGEN
196// Forward declaration
197typedef void (*natsThreadStartedHandler)(void *closure);
198#endif
199
205typedef struct __natsClientConfig
206{
207 int64_t DefaultWriteDeadline;
208
209 int64_t LockSpinCount;
210
211 // Subscription message delivery thread control
212 bool DefaultToThreadPool;
213 int ThreadPoolMax;
214
215 // Reply message delivery thread control
216 bool DefaultRepliesToThreadPool;
217 bool UseSeparatePoolForReplies;
218 int ReplyThreadPoolMax;
219
220 // Callback invoked when a thread created by the library starts
221 natsThreadStartedHandler ThreadStartedHandler;
222 void *ThreadStartedHandlerClosure;
223
224} natsClientConfig;
225
249typedef struct natsMsgList
250{
251 natsMsg **Msgs;
252 int Count;
253
254} natsMsgList;

261{
265 const char **List;
269 int Count;
270
271} natsMetadata;

286typedef struct __jsAtomicBatchCtx jsAtomicBatchCtx;

303typedef struct jsPubOptions
304{
305 int64_t MaxWait;
306 const char *MsgId;
307 const char *ExpectStream;
308 const char *ExpectLastMsgId;
309 uint64_t ExpectLastSeq;
310 uint64_t ExpectLastSubjectSeq;
311 const char *ExpectLastSubjectSeqSubject;
312 bool ExpectNoMessage;
313 int64_t MsgTTL;
314
315} jsPubOptions;

320typedef enum
321{
322 js_LimitsPolicy = 0,
323 js_InterestPolicy,
324 js_WorkQueuePolicy,
325
326} jsRetentionPolicy;
327
331typedef enum
332{
333 js_DiscardOld = 0,
334 js_DiscardNew,
335
336} jsDiscardPolicy;
337
341typedef enum
342{
343 js_FileStorage = 0,
344 js_MemoryStorage,
345
346} jsStorageType;
347
351typedef enum
352{
353 js_StorageCompressionNone = 0,
354 js_StorageCompressionS2,
355} jsStorageCompression;
356
360typedef enum
361{
362 js_DeliverAll = 0,
363 js_DeliverLast,
364 js_DeliverNew,
365 js_DeliverByStartSequence,
366 js_DeliverByStartTime,
367 js_DeliverLastPerSubject,
368
369} jsDeliverPolicy;
370
374typedef enum
375{
376 js_AckExplicit = 0,
377 js_AckNone,
378 js_AckAll,
379
380
381} jsAckPolicy;
382
386typedef enum
387{
388 js_ReplayInstant = 0,
389 js_ReplayOriginal,
390
391} jsReplayPolicy;
392
396typedef enum
397{
398 js_PersistDefault = 0,
399 js_PersistAsync,
400} jsPersistModeType;

413typedef struct jsPlacement
414{
415 const char *Cluster;
416 const char **Tags;
417 int TagsLen;
418
419} jsPlacement;

430typedef struct jsExternalStream
431{
432 const char *APIPrefix;
433 const char *DeliverPrefix;
434
435} jsExternalStream;
436
449typedef struct jsStreamSource
450{
451 const char *Name;
452 uint64_t OptStartSeq;
453 int64_t OptStartTime;
454 const char *FilterSubject;
455 jsExternalStream *External;
456 // Domain and External are mutually exclusive.
457 // If Domain is set, an External value will be created with
458 // the APIPrefix constructed based on the Domain value.
459 const char *Domain;
460
461} jsStreamSource;
462
466typedef struct jsRePublish
467{
468 const char *Source;
469 const char *Destination;
470 bool HeadersOnly;
471
472} jsRePublish;
473
478typedef struct jsSubjectTransformConfig
479{
480 const char *Source;
481 const char *Destination;
482} jsSubjectTransformConfig;
483
488typedef struct jsStreamConsumerLimits
489{
490 int64_t InactiveThreshold;
491 int MaxAckPending;
492} jsStreamConsumerLimits;
493
573typedef struct jsStreamConfig {
574 const char *Name;
575 const char *Description;
576 const char **Subjects;
577 int SubjectsLen;
578 jsRetentionPolicy Retention;
579 int64_t MaxConsumers;
580 int64_t MaxMsgs;
581 int64_t MaxBytes;
582 int64_t MaxAge;
583 int64_t MaxMsgsPerSubject;
584 int32_t MaxMsgSize;
585 jsDiscardPolicy Discard;
586 jsStorageType Storage;
587 int64_t Replicas;
588 bool NoAck;
589 const char *Template;
590 int64_t Duplicates;
591 jsPlacement *Placement;
592 jsStreamSource *Mirror;
593 jsStreamSource **Sources;
594 int SourcesLen;
595 bool Sealed;
596 bool DenyDelete;
597 bool DenyPurge;
598
601 bool AllowRollup;
602
605 jsRePublish *RePublish;
606
609 bool AllowDirect;
610
613 bool MirrorDirect;
614
617 bool DiscardNewPerSubject;
618
622 natsMetadata Metadata;
623
626 jsStorageCompression Compression;
627
629 uint64_t FirstSeq;
630
633 jsSubjectTransformConfig SubjectTransform;
634
637 jsStreamConsumerLimits ConsumerLimits;
638
641 bool AllowMsgTTL;
642
646 int64_t SubjectDeleteMarkerTTL;
647
650 jsPersistModeType PersistMode;
651
653 bool AllowAtomic;
654} jsStreamConfig;
655
659typedef struct jsLostStreamData
660{
661 uint64_t *Msgs;
662 int MsgsLen;
663 uint64_t Bytes;
664
665} jsLostStreamData;
666
672typedef struct jsStreamStateSubject
673{
674 const char *Subject;
675 uint64_t Msgs;
676
677} jsStreamStateSubject;

708typedef struct jsStreamStateSubjects
709{
710 jsStreamStateSubject *List;
711 int Count;
712
713} jsStreamStateSubjects;

721typedef struct jsStreamState
722{
723 uint64_t Msgs;
724 uint64_t Bytes;
725 uint64_t FirstSeq;
726 int64_t FirstTime;
727 uint64_t LastSeq;
728 int64_t LastTime;
729 int64_t NumSubjects;
730 jsStreamStateSubjects *Subjects;
731 uint64_t NumDeleted;
732 uint64_t *Deleted;
733 int DeletedLen;
734 jsLostStreamData *Lost;
735 int64_t Consumers;
736
737} jsStreamState;
738
743typedef struct jsPeerInfo
744{
745 char *Name;
746 bool Current;
747 bool Offline;
748 int64_t Active;
749 uint64_t Lag;
750
751} jsPeerInfo;

757typedef struct jsClusterInfo
758{
759 char *Name;
760 char *Leader;
761 jsPeerInfo **Replicas;
762 int ReplicasLen;
763 char *RaftGroup;
764 int64_t LeaderSince;
765 bool SystemAcc;
766 char *TrafficAcc;
767
768} jsClusterInfo;

773typedef struct jsStreamSourceInfo
774{

781 int SubjectTransformsLen;
782
783} jsStreamSourceInfo;

789{
790 const char *Name;
791 const char *Domain;
792 const char *Cluster;
793
794} jsStreamAlternate;

802typedef struct jsStreamInfo
803{
804 jsStreamConfig *Config;
805 int64_t Created;
806 jsStreamState State;
807 jsClusterInfo *Cluster;
808 jsStreamSourceInfo *Mirror;
809 jsStreamSourceInfo **Sources;
810 int SourcesLen;
811 jsStreamAlternate **Alternates;
812 int AlternatesLen;
813
814} jsStreamInfo;

823typedef struct jsStreamInfoList
824{
825 jsStreamInfo **List;
826 int Count;
827
828} jsStreamInfoList;

837typedef struct jsStreamNamesList
838{
839 char **List;
840 int Count;
841
842} jsStreamNamesList;

887typedef struct jsConsumerConfig
888{
889 const char *Name;
890 const char *Durable;
891 const char *Description;
892 jsDeliverPolicy DeliverPolicy;
893 uint64_t OptStartSeq;
894 int64_t OptStartTime;
895 jsAckPolicy AckPolicy;
896 int64_t AckWait;
897 int64_t MaxDeliver;
898 int64_t *BackOff;
899 int BackOffLen;
900 const char *FilterSubject;
901 jsReplayPolicy ReplayPolicy;
902 uint64_t RateLimit;
903 const char *SampleFrequency;
904 int64_t MaxWaiting;
905 int64_t MaxAckPending;
906 bool FlowControl;
907 int64_t Heartbeat;
908 bool HeadersOnly;
909
910 // Pull based options.
911 int64_t MaxRequestBatch;
912 int64_t MaxRequestExpires;
913 int64_t MaxRequestMaxBytes;
914
915 // Push based options.
916 const char *DeliverSubject;
917 const char *DeliverGroup;
918
919 // Ephemeral inactivity threshold.
920 int64_t InactiveThreshold;
921
922 // Generally inherited by parent stream and other markers, now can be configured directly.
923 int64_t Replicas;
924 // Force memory storage.
925 bool MemoryStorage;
926
927 // Configuration options introduced in 2.10
928
929 const char **FilterSubjects;
930 int FilterSubjectsLen;
931 natsMetadata Metadata;
932
933 // Configuration options introduced in 2.11
934
938 int64_t PauseUntil;
939
943 const char *PriorityPolicy;
944
949 int64_t PinnedTTL;
950
952 const char **PriorityGroups;
953 int PriorityGroupsLen;
954} jsConsumerConfig;
955
973typedef struct jsConsumerSequenceMismatch
974{
975 uint64_t Stream;
976 uint64_t ConsumerClient;
977 uint64_t ConsumerServer;
978
979} jsConsumerSequenceMismatch;

1047 jsConsumerConfig Config;
1054 bool Ordered;
1055
1056} jsSubOptions;

1095typedef struct jsConsumerInfo
1096{
1097 char *Stream;
1098 char *Name;
1099 int64_t Created;
1100 jsConsumerConfig *Config;
1101 jsSequenceInfo Delivered;
1102 jsSequenceInfo AckFloor;
1103 int64_t NumAckPending;
1104 int64_t NumRedelivered;
1105 int64_t NumWaiting;
1106 uint64_t NumPending;
1107 jsClusterInfo *Cluster;
1108 bool PushBound;
1109 bool Paused;
1110 int64_t PauseRemaining;
1111 jsPriorityGroupState *PriorityGroups;
1112 int PriorityGroupsLen;
1113} jsConsumerInfo;

1169{

1195typedef struct jsAccountInfo
1196{

1198 uint64_t Store;

1200 int64_t Consumers;

1205 int TiersLen;
1206
1207} jsAccountInfo;

1216typedef struct jsMsgMetaData
1217{
1218 jsSequencePair Sequence;
1219 uint64_t NumDelivered;
1220 uint64_t NumPending;
1221 int64_t Timestamp;
1222 char *Stream;
1223 char *Consumer;
1224 char *Domain;
1225
1226} jsMsgMetaData;

1231typedef struct jsPubAck
1232{
1233 char *Stream;
1234 uint64_t Sequence;
1235 char *Domain;
1236 bool Duplicate;
1237 char *Batch;
1238 uint64_t Count;
1239
1240} jsPubAck;
1241
1246typedef struct jsPubAckErr
1247{
1248 natsMsg *Msg;
1249 natsStatus Err;
1250 jsErrCode ErrCode;
1251 const char *ErrText;
1252
1253} jsPubAckErr;
1254
1255#ifndef BUILD_IN_DOXYGEN
1256// Forward declarations
1257typedef void (*jsPubAckErrHandler)(jsCtx *js, jsPubAckErr *pae, void *closure);
1258typedef void (*jsPubAckHandler)(jsCtx *js, natsMsg *msg, jsPubAck *pa, jsPubAckErr *pae, void *closure);
1259#endif

1270typedef struct jsDirectGetMsgOptions
1271{
1272 uint64_t Sequence;
1273 const char *NextBySubject;
1274 const char *LastBySubject;
1275
1276} jsDirectGetMsgOptions;
1277
1283typedef struct jsFetchRequest
1284{
1285 int64_t Expires;
1286 int Batch;
1287 int64_t MaxBytes;
1288 bool NoWait;
1289 int64_t Heartbeat;
1290
1291 // The use of these fields require nats-server v2.11.0 or later
1292 int64_t MinPending;
1293 int64_t MinAckPending;
1294 const char *ID;
1296 const char *Group;
1297 // The use of this field require nats-server v2.12.0 or later
1298 uint8_t Priority;
1301
1302} jsFetchRequest;
1303
1325typedef void (*jsFetchCompleteHandler)(natsConnection *nc, natsSubscription *sub, natsStatus s, void *closure);
1326
1337typedef bool (*jsFetchNextHandler)(int *messages, int64_t *maxBytes, natsSubscription *sub, void *closure);
1338
1344typedef struct jsOptionsPullSubscribeAsync
1345{
1346 int64_t Timeout;
1347 int MaxMessages;
1348 int64_t MaxBytes;
1349
1357 bool NoWait;
1358
1362 jsFetchCompleteHandler CompleteHandler;
1363 void *CompleteHandlerClosure;
1364
1367 int64_t Heartbeat;
1368
1373 const char *Group;
1374
1380 int64_t MinPending;
1381
1387 int64_t MinAckPending;
1388
1392 int FetchSize;
1393
1400 int KeepAhead;
1401
1407 jsFetchNextHandler NextHandler;
1408 void *NextHandlerClosure;
1409
1410} jsOptionsPullSubscribeAsync;
1411
1417typedef struct jsOptionsPublishAsync
1418{
1419 int64_t MaxPending;
1420
1421 // If jsPubAckHandler is specified, the callback will be invoked
1422 // for every asynchronous published message, either as a positive
1423 // result, or with the error encountered when publishing that
1424 // message. If this callback is specified, ErrHandler (see below)
1425 // will be ignored.
1426 jsPubAckHandler AckHandler;
1427 void *AckHandlerClosure;
1428
1429 // This callback is invoked for messages published asynchronously
1430 // when an error is returned by the server or if the library has
1431 // timed-out waiting for an acknowledgment back from the server
1432 // (if publish uses the jsPubOptions.MaxWait).
1433 jsPubAckErrHandler ErrHandler;
1434 void *ErrHandlerClosure;
1435
1436 int64_t StallWait;
1437
1438} jsOptionsPublishAsync;
1439
1449typedef struct jsOptionsStreamPurge
1450{
1451 const char *Subject;
1452 uint64_t Sequence;
1453 uint64_t Keep;
1454
1455} jsOptionsStreamPurge;
1456
1460typedef struct jsOptionsStreamInfo
1461{
1462 bool DeletedDetails;
1463 const char *SubjectsFilter;
1464
1465} jsOptionsStreamInfo;
1466
1473typedef struct jsOptionsStream
1474{
1475 jsOptionsStreamPurge Purge;
1476 jsOptionsStreamInfo Info;
1477
1478} jsOptionsStream;
1479
1485typedef struct jsOptions
1486{
1487 const char *Prefix;
1488 const char *Domain;
1489 int64_t Wait;
1490 jsOptionsPublishAsync PublishAsync;
1491 jsOptionsPullSubscribeAsync PullSubscribeAsync;
1492 jsOptionsStream Stream;
1493
1494} jsOptions;

1499typedef struct __kvStore kvStore;
1500
1504typedef struct __kvEntry kvEntry;
1505
1509typedef struct __kvStatus kvStatus;
1510
1514typedef struct __kvWatcher kvWatcher;
1515
1519typedef enum
1520{
1521 kvOp_Unknown = 0,
1522 kvOp_Put,
1523 kvOp_Delete,
1524 kvOp_Purge,
1525
1526} kvOperation;
1527
1533typedef struct kvConfig
1534{
1535 const char *Bucket;
1536 const char *Description;
1537 int32_t MaxValueSize;
1538 uint8_t History;
1539 int64_t TTL;
1540 int64_t MaxBytes;
1541 jsStorageType StorageType;
1542 int Replicas;
1543 jsRePublish *RePublish;
1544 jsStreamSource *Mirror;
1545 jsStreamSource **Sources;
1546 int SourcesLen;
1547
1548} kvConfig;
1549
1555typedef struct kvWatchOptions
1556{
1561 bool IgnoreDeletes;
1562
1569 bool IncludeHistory;
1570
1575 bool MetaOnly;
1576
1581 int64_t Timeout;
1582
1592 bool UpdatesOnly;
1593
1600 int64_t Heartbeat;
1601
1612 uint64_t ResumeFromRevision;
1613
1614} kvWatchOptions;
1615
1621typedef struct kvPurgeOptions
1622{
1623 // How long to wait (in milliseconds) for some operations to complete.
1624 int64_t Timeout;
1625
1626 // When calling kvStore_PurgeDeletes(), all keys that have a delete or
1627 // purge marker as the last entry are gathered and then those keys
1628 // are purged of their content, including the marker.
1629 // Starting with NATS C client v3.3.0, if this option is not specified,
1630 // only the markers older than 30 minutes will be deleted. Use this
1631 // option to set the limit or a negative value to force removal of
1632 // markers regardless of their age.
1633 // The value is expressed as a time in nanoseconds.
1634 int64_t DeleteMarkersOlderThan;
1635
1636} kvPurgeOptions;
1637
1655typedef struct kvEntryList
1656{
1657 kvEntry **Entries;
1658 int Count;
1659
1660} kvEntryList;
1661
1679typedef struct kvKeysList
1680{
1681 char **Keys;
1682 int Count;
1683
1684} kvKeysList;

// end of typesGroup
2136
2137//
2138// Callbacks.
2139//
2140
2163typedef void (*natsMsgHandler)(
2164 natsConnection *nc, natsSubscription *sub, natsMsg *msg, void *closure);
2165
2179typedef void (*natsConnectionHandler)(
2180 natsConnection *nc, void *closure);
2181
2193typedef natsStatus (*natsProxyConnHandler)(
2194 natsSock *fd, char *host, int port, void *closure);
2195
2202typedef void (*natsErrHandler)(
2203 natsConnection *nc, natsSubscription *subscription, natsStatus err,
2204 void *closure);
2205
2219typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_Attach)(
2220 void **userData,
2221 void *loop,
2222 natsConnection *nc,
2223 natsSock socket);
2224
2234typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_ReadAddRemove)(
2235 void *userData,
2236 bool add);
2237
2247typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_WriteAddRemove)(
2248 void *userData,
2249 bool add);
2250
2258typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_Detach)(
2259 void *userData);
2260
2282typedef natsStatus (*natsUserJWTHandler)(
2283 char **userJWT,
2284 char **customErrTxt,
2285 void *closure);
2286
2287
2313typedef natsStatus (*natsSignatureHandler)(
2314 char **customErrTxt,
2315 unsigned char **signature,
2316 int *signatureLength,
2317 const char *nonce,
2318 void *closure);
2319
2328typedef const char* (*natsTokenHandler)(void *closure);
2329
2330
2338typedef void (*natsOnCompleteCB)(void *closure);
2339
2360typedef int64_t (*natsCustomReconnectDelayHandler)(natsConnection *nc, int attempts, void *closure);
2361
2385typedef int (*natsSSLVerifyCb)(int preverifyOk, void *ctx);
2386
2387#ifdef BUILD_IN_DOXYGEN
2421typedef void (*jsPubAckErrHandler)(jsCtx *js, jsPubAckErr *pae, void *closure);
2422
2464typedef void (*jsPubAckHandler)(jsCtx *js, natsMsg *msg, jsPubAck *pa, jsPubAckErr *pae, void *closure);
2465
2506typedef void (*natsThreadStartedHandler)(void *closure);
2507#endif
2508
2509#if defined(NATS_HAS_STREAMING)
2518typedef void (*stanPubAckHandler)(const char *guid, const char *error, void *closure);
2519
2529typedef void (*stanMsgHandler)(
2530 stanConnection *sc, stanSubscription *sub, const char *channel, stanMsg *msg, void *closure);
2531
2538typedef void (*stanConnectionLostHandler)(
2539 stanConnection *sc, const char* errorTxt, void *closure);
2540#endif
2541
// end of callbacksGroup
2543
2544//
2545// Functions.
2546//

2574nats_OpenWithConfig(natsClientConfig *config);

2590nats_Open(int64_t lockSpinCount);

2631 NATS_VERSION_STRING)

2634nats_CheckCompatibilityImpl(uint32_t reqVerNumber, uint32_t verNumber, const char *verString);

2993/*
2994 * The above is for doxygen. The proper syntax for username/password
2995 * is without the '\' character:
2996 *
2997 * nats://localhost:4222
2998 * nats://user@localhost:4222
2999 * nats://user:password@localhost:4222
3000 */

9685//
9686// Microservices.
9687//
9688
9731typedef struct micro_client_s microClient;
9732
9736typedef struct __for_forward_compatibility_only microClientConfig;
9737
9747typedef struct micro_endpoint_s microEndpoint;
9748
9756typedef struct micro_endpoint_config_s microEndpointConfig;
9757
9767typedef struct micro_endpoint_info_s microEndpointInfo;
9768
9777typedef struct micro_endpoint_stats_s microEndpointStats;
9778
9791typedef struct micro_error_s microError;
9792
9800typedef struct micro_group_s microGroup;
9801
9808typedef struct micro_group_config_s microGroupConfig;
9809
9815typedef struct micro_request_s microRequest;
9816
9828typedef struct micro_service_s microService;
9829
9839typedef struct micro_service_config_s microServiceConfig;
9840
9850typedef struct micro_service_info_s microServiceInfo;
9851
9858typedef struct micro_service_stats_s microServiceStats;
9859
9860
9861extern NATS_EXTERN microError *micro_ErrorOutOfMemory;
9862extern NATS_EXTERN microError *micro_ErrorInvalidArg;
9863
// end of microTypes
9865
9884typedef microError *(*microRequestHandler)(microRequest *req);
9885
9908typedef void (*microErrorHandler)(microService *m, microEndpoint *ep, natsStatus s);
9909
9921typedef void (*microDoneHandler)(microService *m);
9922
// end of microCallbacks
9924
9935struct micro_endpoint_config_s
9936{
9942 const char *Name;
9943
9953 const char *Subject;
9954
9959 const char *QueueGroup;
9960
9965 bool NoQueueGroup;
9966
9971 natsMetadata Metadata;
9972
9976 microRequestHandler Handler;
9977
9982 void *State;
9983};
9984
9988struct micro_endpoint_info_s
9989{
9993 const char *Name;
9994
9998 const char *Subject;
9999
10004 const char *QueueGroup;
10005
10010 natsMetadata Metadata;
10011};
10012
10016struct micro_endpoint_stats_s
10017{
10018 const char *Name;
10019 const char *Subject;
10020
10025 const char *QueueGroup;
10026
10030 int64_t NumRequests;
10031
10036 int64_t NumErrors;
10037
10041 int64_t ProcessingTimeSeconds;
10042
10046 int64_t ProcessingTimeNanoseconds;
10047
10051 int64_t AverageProcessingTimeNanoseconds;
10052
10056 char LastErrorString[2048];
10057};
10058
10062struct micro_group_config_s
10063{
10065 const char *Prefix;
10066
10068 const char *QueueGroup;
10069
10071 bool NoQueueGroup;
10072};
10073
10080struct micro_service_config_s
10081{
10087 const char *Name;
10088
10092 const char *Version;
10093
10097 const char *Description;
10098
10103 const char *QueueGroup;
10104
10109 bool NoQueueGroup;
10110
10115 natsMetadata Metadata;
10116
10124 microEndpointConfig *Endpoint;
10125
10133 microRequestHandler StatsHandler;
10134
10142 microErrorHandler ErrHandler;
10143
10152 microDoneHandler DoneHandler;
10153
10161 void *State;
10162};
10163
10169struct micro_service_info_s
10170{
10174 const char *Type;
10175
10179 const char *Name;
10180
10184 const char *Version;
10185
10189 const char *Description;
10190
10194 const char *Id;
10195
10199 natsMetadata Metadata;
10200
10204 microEndpointInfo *Endpoints;
10205
10209 int EndpointsLen;
10210};
10211
10215struct micro_service_stats_s
10216{
10220 const char *Type;
10221
10225 const char *Name;
10226
10230 const char *Version;
10231
10235 const char *Id;
10236
10240 int64_t Started;
10241
10245 microEndpointStats *Endpoints;
10246
10250 int EndpointsLen;
10251};
10252
// end of microStructs
10254

Returns the number of bytes to be sent to the server.

Read the last connection error into a user provided buffer.

NATS_EXTERN void natsConnection_Close(natsConnection *nc)
Closes the connection.

NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_Flush(natsConnection *nc)
Flushes the connection.

NATS_EXTERN bool natsConnection_IsDraining(natsConnection *nc)
Test if connection is draining.

Drops the current connection, reconnects including re-subscribing.

NATS_EXTERN natsConnStatus natsConnection_Status(natsConnection *nc)
Returns the current state of the connection.

NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetConnectedServerId(natsConnection *nc, char *buffer, size_t bufferSize)
Gets the server Id.

Test if connection has been closed.

NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_Drain(natsConnection *nc)
Drains the connection with default timeout.
natsConnection_IsReconnecting
NATS_EXTERN bool natsConnection_IsReconnecting(natsConnection *nc)
Test if connection is reconnecting.

Gets the connection statistics.
natsConnection_GetMaxPayload
NATS_EXTERN int64_t natsConnection_GetMaxPayload(natsConnection *nc)
Returns the maximum message payload.
natsConnection_Sign
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_Sign(natsConnection *nc, const unsigned char *message, int messageLen, unsigned char sig[64])
Signs any 'message' using the connection's user credentials.
natsConnection_GetName
NATS_EXTERN const char * natsConnection_GetName(natsConnection *nc)
Returns the name of this connection.
natsConnection_Connect
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_Connect(natsConnection **nc, natsOptions *options)
Connects to a NATS Server using the provided options.
natsConnection_GetClientID
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetClientID(natsConnection *nc, uint64_t *cid)
Gets the current client ID assigned by the server.
natsConnection_FlushTimeout
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_FlushTimeout(natsConnection *nc, int64_t timeout)
Flushes the connection with a given timeout.
natsConnection_ProcessDetachedEvent
NATS_EXTERN void natsConnection_ProcessDetachedEvent(natsConnection *nc)
Process a detach event when using external event loop.
natsConnection_ProcessCloseEvent
NATS_EXTERN void natsConnection_ProcessCloseEvent(natsSock *socket)
Process a socket close event when using external event loop.
natsConnection_GetLocalIPAndPort
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetLocalIPAndPort(natsConnection *nc, char **ip, int *port)
Returns the connection local IP and port.
natsConnection_GetRTT
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetRTT(natsConnection *nc, int64_t *rtt)
Returns the round trip time between this client and the server.
natsConnection_ProcessReadEvent
NATS_EXTERN void natsConnection_ProcessReadEvent(natsConnection *nc)
Process a read event when using external event loop.
natsConnection_GetLastError
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetLastError(natsConnection *nc, const char **lastError)
Gets the last connection error.
natsConnection_GetDiscoveredServers
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetDiscoveredServers(natsConnection *nc, char ***servers, int *count)
Returns the list of discovered server URLs.
natsConnection_HasHeaderSupport
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_HasHeaderSupport(natsConnection *nc)
Returns if the connection to current server supports headers.
natsConnection_ProcessWriteEvent
NATS_EXTERN void natsConnection_ProcessWriteEvent(natsConnection *nc)
Process a write event when using external event loop.
natsConnection_GetClientIP
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetClientIP(natsConnection *nc, char **ip)
Returns the client's IP address as reported by the server.
natsConnection_DrainTimeout
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_DrainTimeout(natsConnection *nc, int64_t timeout)
Drains the connection with given timeout.
natsConnection_GetServers
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetServers(natsConnection *nc, char ***servers, int *count)
Returns the list of server URLs known to this connection.
natsConnection_GetConnectedUrl
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetConnectedUrl(natsConnection *nc, char *buffer, size_t bufferSize)
Gets the URL of the currently connected server.
natsConnection_ConnectTo
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_ConnectTo(natsConnection **nc, const char *urls)
Connects to a NATS Server using any of the URL from the given list.
natsConnection_Destroy
NATS_EXTERN void natsConnection_Destroy(natsConnection *nc)
Destroys the connection object.
natsConnection_RequestMsg
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_RequestMsg(natsMsg **replyMsg, natsConnection *nc, natsMsg *requestMsg, int64_t timeout)
Sends a request based on the given requestMsg and waits for a reply.
natsConnection_RequestString
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_RequestString(natsMsg **replyMsg, natsConnection *nc, const char *subj, const char *str, int64_t timeout)
Sends a request (as a string) and waits for a reply.
natsConnection_SendMsg
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_SendMsg(natsConnection *nc, natsMsg *msg)
Sends a message with reduced latency.
natsConnection_PublishMsg
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_PublishMsg(natsConnection *nc, natsMsg *msg)
Publishes a message on a subject.
natsConnection_Send
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_Send(natsConnection *nc, const char *subj, const void *data, int dataLen)
Sends data on a subject with reduced latency.
natsConnection_SendRequest
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_SendRequest(natsConnection *nc, const char *subj, const char *reply, const void *data, int dataLen)

Returns the value for this key.

Returns the time (in UTC) the data was put in the bucket.

Returns the unique sequence for this value.
kvEntry_Delta

Returns the distance from the latest value.

Destroys the KeyValue entry object.

Returns the type of operation of this value.
kvEntry_ValueLen

Initializes a KeyValue purge options structure.

Places the value (as a string) for the key into the store if and only if the key does not exist.

Returns a watcher for any updates to keys that match the keys argument.

Deletes a key by placing a delete marker and leaving all revisions.

Deletes a key by placing a purge marker and removing all revisions.

Initializes a KeyValue watcher options structure.

NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetEventLoop(natsOptions *opts, void *loop, natsEvLoop_Attach attachCb, natsEvLoop_ReadAddRemove readCb, natsEvLoop_WriteAddRemove writeCb, natsEvLoop_Detach detachCb)
Sets the external event loop and associated callbacks.
natsOptions_SetMaxReconnect
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetMaxReconnect(natsOptions *opts, int maxReconnect)
Sets the maximum number of reconnect attempts.
natsOptions_SetDiscoveredServersCB
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetDiscoveredServersCB(natsOptions *opts, natsConnectionHandler discoveredServersCb, void *closure)
Sets the callback to be invoked when new servers are discovered.

NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_UseGlobalMessageDelivery(natsOptions *opts, bool global)
Switch on/off the use of a central message delivery thread pool.

Sets a custom inbox prefix.

Performs TLS handshake first.
natsOptions_SetServers
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetServers(natsOptions *opts, const char **servers, int serversCount)
Set the list of servers to try to (re)connect to.
natsOptions_SetToken
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetToken(natsOptions *opts, const char *token)
Sets the token to use when not specified in the URL.
natsOptions_SetProxyConnHandler

Sets the proxy connection handler.

Sets the callback to be invoked when the connection to a server is lost.

Fails pending requests on disconnect event.
natsOptions_SetPingInterval

Sets the ping interval.
natsOptions_SetCertificatesChain

Sets the client certificate and key.

Sets the trusted CA certificates from memory.

Sets the timeout for waiting for an ACK for a published message.

@ js_PersistDefault
Writes are immediately flushed, acknowledgement sent after message is stored.

js_DiscardNew

js_DiscardOld

js_ReplayInstant
